Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator

Class CritterGenerator

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator.CritterGenerator
public class CritterGenerator extends Object
Facade that orchestrates the full ClassFile-based code generation pipeline for a Morphia entity, including field/method accessor injection and property/entity model generation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CritterGenerator(Mapper mapper)
    Creates a new CritterGenerator with the given mapper.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityModelGenerator
    entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
    EntityModelGenerator
    entityModel(Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
    Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type, reading entity-level annotations from standinType.
    byte[]
    fieldAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<FieldInfo> fields)
    Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its fields.
    EntityModelGenerator
    generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
    EntityModelGenerator
    generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
    Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
    byte[]
    methodAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<MethodInfo> methods)
    Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its getter methods.
    void
    nestmateAccessor(Class<?> entityType, FieldInfo field)
    Generates a nestmate accessor for the given field and registers the instance in NestmateAccessorRegistry.
    void
    nestmateAccessor(Class<?> entityType, MethodInfo method)
    Generates a nestmate accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method and registers the instance in NestmateAccessorRegistry.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.

    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.

    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.

    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.

    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.

    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator

    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.

    propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.

  • Constructor Details

    • CritterGenerator

      public CritterGenerator(Mapper mapper)
      Creates a new CritterGenerator with the given mapper.
      Parameters:
      mapper - the Morphia mapper

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public EntityModelGenerator generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, boolean runtimeMode)
      Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class to process
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive generated bytecode
      runtimeMode - true to generate hidden nestmate accessors for runtime use
      Returns:
      the generated entity model generator

    • generate

      public EntityModelGenerator generate(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader)
      Reads the entity class bytecode, discovers its properties, and generates all required Critter support classes using build-time (non-runtime) mode.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class to process
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive generated bytecode
      Returns:
      the generated entity model generator

    • fieldAccessors

      public byte[] fieldAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<FieldInfo> fields)
      Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its fields.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class to augment
      fields - the fields for which accessor methods should be generated
      Returns:
      the augmented class bytecode

    • methodAccessors

      public byte[] methodAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<MethodInfo> methods)
      Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its getter methods.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class to augment
      methods - the getter methods for which accessor methods should be generated
      Returns:
      the augmented class bytecode

    • propertyAccessor

      public PropertyAccessorGenerator propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
      Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given field.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      field - the field for which a property accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property accessor generator

    • propertyAccessor

      public PropertyAccessorGenerator propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
      Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      method - the getter method for which a property accessor should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property accessor generator

    • nestmateAccessor

      public void nestmateAccessor(Class<?> entityType, FieldInfo field)
      Generates a nestmate accessor for the given field and registers the instance in NestmateAccessorRegistry. The accessor is defined as a hidden nestmate of entityType so it can directly access private fields via getfield/putfield.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      field - the field for which a nestmate accessor should be generated

    • nestmateAccessor

      public void nestmateAccessor(Class<?> entityType, MethodInfo method)
      Generates a nestmate accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method and registers the instance in NestmateAccessorRegistry.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      method - the getter method for which a nestmate accessor should be generated

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the field
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      field - the field for which a property model should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property model generator

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, FieldInfo field, boolean runtimeMode)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given field, reading annotations from annotationSource.
      Parameters:
      runtimeMode - true to use the nestmate accessor registry instead of generating new bytecode

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the entity class that owns the method
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      method - the getter method for which a property model should be generated
      Returns:
      the emitted property model generator

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.

    • propertyModelGenerator

      public PropertyModelGenerator propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
      Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
      Parameters:
      runtimeMode - true to use the nestmate accessor registry instead of generating new bytecode

    • entityModel

      public EntityModelGenerator entityModel(Class<?> type, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
      Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type.
      Parameters:
      type - the entity class
      critterClassLoader - the class loader that will receive the generated bytecode
      properties - the list of property model generators for the entity's properties
      Returns:
      the emitted entity model generator

    • entityModel

      public EntityModelGenerator entityModel(Class<?> type, Class<?> standinType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, List<PropertyModelGenerator> properties)
      Generates and registers the entity model class for the given type, reading entity-level annotations from standinType.
